description: Monitors Salesforce for new, aging, and untriaged cases. Part of the Carrier Case Triage Agent Swarm.
use_case: MVP Use Case 1 - Customer Service Case Triage

demo_scenarios.name: Get New Cases
demo_scenarios.description: Retrieve all new cases that need triage
demo_scenarios.expected_output: List of new Salesforce cases with subject, account, creation time

demo_scenarios.name: Get Aging Cases
demo_scenarios.description: Retrieve cases that are approaching or exceeding SLA thresholds
demo_scenarios.expected_output: List of aging cases with age in hours

demo_scenarios.name: Get Case Details
demo_scenarios.description: Get full details for a specific case
demo_scenarios.expected_output: Full case record with description, attachments, contact info

demo_scenarios.name: Get Queue Summary
demo_scenarios.description: Get overview of case queue status
demo_scenarios.expected_output: Summary showing new, aging, and untriaged case counts
